experimental_design: differential myotube phosphoproteome study using IGF-1 in combination with LY or the Akt inhibitor MK-2206
factor_value: contracting myotubes were either treated with 10 ng/ml IGF-1, 10 ng/ml IGF-1 + 10 μM LY294002 or 10 ng/ml IGF-1 + 10 μM MK-2206
number_of_samples: 3 biological replicates and 30 fractions imply 3 × 30 = 90 total samples
